message:
test(search-core): add 18 tests for RRF fusion infrastructure

Expand fusion.rs from 11 to 29 tests covering:
- Serde roundtrips: RrfConfig, SourceContribution, FusionExplain,
  FusedHit, FusionResult
- fuse_rrf: empty candidates, limit=0 clamped to 1, semantic-only
  candidates (lexical contribution=0), offset beyond results,
  exact score calculation (1/(k+3) + 1/(k+5)), single candidate
- fuse_rrf_default: convenience wrapper preserves defaults
- Dual-source beats single-source at same rank
- Lexical tiebreak when RRF scores equal
- fused_hit_cmp: NaN score safety (no panic)
- SourceContribution: None rank with zero contribution
- FusionResult: pagination metadata preservation
- rrf_contribution: rank=0 edge case (1/k)

Also fix misplaced #[allow] attributes in hybrid_candidates.rs that
caused compilation errors (inline attribute on method chain).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
